# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, save_document,
    create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_part import (
    sketch, sketch_corner_rectangle, extrude_boss,
    end_sketch, current_sketch_name, _ensure_sketch_selected
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

# ============================================================
session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# Step 0: 打开原文件
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
print(f"已打开: {get_com_member(model, 'GetTitle')}")

# 另存为备份（修改在备份文件上进行）
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已备份为: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1: 上视基准面 → 画矩形辐条
# ============================================================
with sketch(model, "Top Plane") as sk:
    # 对角矩形: (0, -0.75) → (109.57, 0.75), 宽1.5mm
    sketch_corner_rectangle(model, 0, mm(-0.75), mm(109.57), mm(0.75))
print("[1/4] 草图: 辐条矩形 1.5x109.57mm, 从原点沿+X")

# ============================================================
# Step 2: 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z, 合并结果
# ============================================================
spoke_feat = extrude_boss(model, sk, mm(4), direction=True, merge=True)
spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
print(f"[2/4] 拉伸凸台: 4mm +Z, 合并, 特征名={spoke_name}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
model.ClearSelection2(True)
ext = model.Extension

# 选中辐条特征 (mark=4)
ext.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)

# 选外圆柱面作为阵列轴 (mark=1)
# 波带片外径110mm, Z=2mm 是中间高度
ext.SelectByID2("", "FACE", mm(109.9), 0, mm(2), True, 1, EV(), 0)

# 圆周阵列: 3个, 360°等间距
model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
    3,              # 数量
    2 * math.pi,    # 总角度 360°
    True,           # 等间距
    False,          # geometry pattern
    False,          # reverse direction
    True,           # pattern seed only
    True            # use auto select
)
print("[3/4] 圆周阵列: 3根辐条, 360°等间距")
gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4/4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
stat = os.stat(stl_path)
print(f"      导出STL: {stl_path} ({stat.st_size} bytes)")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

ext.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)

ext.SelectByID2("", "FACE", mm(109.9), 0, mm(2), True, 1, EV(), 0)

# 圆周阵列: 3个, 360°等间距

    False,          # geometry pattern
    False,          # reverse direction
    True,           # pattern seed only
    True            # use auto select
)

gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4/4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
stat = os.stat(stl_path)
print(f"      导出STL: {stl_path} ({stat.st_size} bytes)")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, save_document,
    create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_part import (
    sketch, sketch_corner_rectangle, extrude_boss,
    end_sketch, current_sketch_name, _ensure_sketch_selected
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

# ============================================================
session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# Step 0: 打开原文件
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
print(f"已打开: {get_com_member(model, 'GetTitle')}")

# 另存为备份（修改在备份文件上进行）
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已备份为: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1: 上视基准面 → 画矩形辐条
# ============================================================
with sketch(model, "Top Plane") as sk:
    # 对角矩形: (0, -0.75) → (109.57, 0.75), 宽1.5mm
    sketch_corner_rectangle(model, 0, mm(-0.75), mm(109.57), mm(0.75))
print("[1/4] 草图: 辐条矩形 1.5x109.57mm, 从原点沿+X")

# ============================================================
# Step 2: 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z, 合并结果
# ============================================================
spoke_feat = extrude_boss(model, sk, mm(4), direction=True, merge=True)
spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
print(f"[2/4] 拉伸凸台: 4mm +Z, 合并, 特征名={spoke_name}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
model.ClearSelection2(True)
ext = model.Extension

# 选中辐条特征 (mark=4)
ext.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)

# 选外圆柱面作为阵列轴 (mark=1)
# 波带片外径110mm, Z=2mm 是中间高度
ext.SelectByID2("", "FACE", mm(109.9), 0, mm(2), True, 1, EV(), 0)

# 圆周阵列: 3个, 360°等间距
model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
    3,              # 数量
    2 * math.pi,    # 总角度 360°
    True,           # 等间距
    False,          # geometry pattern
    False,          # reverse direction
    True,           # pattern seed only
    True            # use auto select
)
print("[3/4] 圆周阵列: 3根辐条, 360°等间距")
gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4/4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
stat = os.stat(stl_path)
print(f"      导出STL: {stl_path} ({stat.st_size} bytes)")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条 v2（不合并+手动合并策略）"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_part import (
    sketch_corner_rectangle, start_sketch, end_sketch
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

# ============================================================
session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# Step 0: 打开原文件并另存为
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
print(f"已打开: {get_com_member(model, 'GetTitle')}")
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已备份: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1+2: 上视基准面 → 画矩形辐条 → 拉伸
# ============================================================
start_sketch(model, "Top Plane")
sketch_corner_rectangle(model, 0, mm(-0.75), mm(109.57), mm(0.75))
end_sketch(model)
print("[1] 草图: 辐条矩形 1.5x109.57mm")

# 用坐标选中草图 (origin在草图上)
model.ClearSelection2(True)
sel_ok = model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "SKETCH", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
print(f"[2] 选中草图: {sel_ok}")

# 拉伸: 先不合并 (merge=False, UseAutoSelect=True)
spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True,     # Sd
    False,    # Flip
    True,     # Dir: +Z
    0,        # T1: Blind
    0,        # T2
    mm(4),    # D1: 4mm
    0,        # D2
    False, False, False, False,
    0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    False,    # Merge: NO
    False,    # UseFeatScope
    True,     # UseAutoSelect
    0, 0.0, False
)
spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
print(f"[2] 拉伸结果: {spoke_name or 'None (失败!)'}")

if not spoke_feat:
    # 备选: 尝试双向拉伸
    print("  尝试双向...")
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "SKETCH", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
    spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
        False, False, True, 0, 0, mm(4), mm(0.001),
        False, False, False, False, 0.0, 0.0,
        False, False, False, False,
        False, False, True,
        0, 0.0, False
    )
    spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
    print(f"  双向拉伸: {spoke_name or 'None'}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
if spoke_feat:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    # Select feature by name
    model.Extension.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)
    # Select outer cylindrical face as axis
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "FACE", mm(109.9), 0, mm(2), True, 1, EV(), 0)
    model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
        3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
    )
    print("[3] 圆周阵列: 3根辐条, 360°等间距")
    gc.collect()
else:
    print("[3] 跳过阵列 (辐条未创建)")

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 合并所有实体
# ============================================================
bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
n = len(bodies) if bodies else 0
print(f"    合并前实体数: {n}")

if n > 1:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    for i, body in enumerate(bodies):
        model.Extension.SelectByID2(body.Name, "SOLIDBODY", 0, 0, 0, i > 0, 0, EV(), 0)
    nothing = VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_DISPATCH, None)
    try:
        model.FeatureManager.InsertCombineFeature(0, nothing)
        print("[4] 实体已合并")
    except Exception as e:

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条 v2（不合并+手动合并策略）"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_part import (
    sketch_corner_rectangle, start_sketch, end_sketch
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

# ============================================================
session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# Step 0: 打开原文件并另存为
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
print(f"已打开: {get_com_member(model, 'GetTitle')}")
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已备份: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1+2: 上视基准面 → 画矩形辐条 → 拉伸
# ============================================================
start_sketch(model, "Top Plane")
sketch_corner_rectangle(model, 0, mm(-0.75), mm(109.57), mm(0.75))
end_sketch(model)
print("[1] 草图: 辐条矩形 1.5x109.57mm")

# 用坐标选中草图 (origin在草图上)
model.ClearSelection2(True)
sel_ok = model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "SKETCH", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
print(f"[2] 选中草图: {sel_ok}")

# 拉伸: 先不合并 (merge=False, UseAutoSelect=True)
spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True,     # Sd
    False,    # Flip
    True,     # Dir: +Z
    0,        # T1: Blind
    0,        # T2
    mm(4),    # D1: 4mm
    0,        # D2
    False, False, False, False,
    0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    False,    # Merge: NO
    False,    # UseFeatScope
    True,     # UseAutoSelect
    0, 0.0, False
)
spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
print(f"[2] 拉伸结果: {spoke_name or 'None (失败!)'}")

if not spoke_feat:
    # 备选: 尝试双向拉伸
    print("  尝试双向...")
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "SKETCH", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
    spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
        False, False, True, 0, 0, mm(4), mm(0.001),
        False, False, False, False, 0.0, 0.0,
        False, False, False, False,
        False, False, True,
        0, 0.0, False
    )
    spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
    print(f"  双向拉伸: {spoke_name or 'None'}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
if spoke_feat:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    # Select feature by name
    model.Extension.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)
    # Select outer cylindrical face as axis
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "FACE", mm(109.9), 0, mm(2), True, 1, EV(), 0)
    model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
        3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
    )
    print("[3] 圆周阵列: 3根辐条, 360°等间距")
    gc.collect()
else:
    print("[3] 跳过阵列 (辐条未创建)")

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 合并所有实体
# ============================================================
bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
n = len(bodies) if bodies else 0
print(f"    合并前实体数: {n}")

if n > 1:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    for i, body in enumerate(bodies):
        model.Extension.SelectByID2(body.Name, "SOLIDBODY", 0, 0, 0, i > 0, 0, EV(), 0)
    nothing = VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_DISPATCH, None)
    try:
        model.FeatureManager.InsertCombineFeature(0, nothing)
        print("[4] 实体已合并")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[4] 合并失败: {e}")

# ============================================================
# Step 5: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[5] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
print(f"    导出STL: {stl_path} ({os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes)")

# Final check
bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
print(f"    最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc}特征")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, save_document,
    create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_part import (
    sketch, sketch_corner_rectangle, extrude_boss,
    end_sketch, current_sketch_name, _ensure_sketch_selected
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

# ============================================================
session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# Step 0: 打开原文件
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
print(f"已打开: {get_com_member(model, 'GetTitle')}")

# 另存为备份（修改在备份文件上进行）
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已备份为: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1+2: 上视基准面 → 画矩形辐条 → 拉伸凸台
# ============================================================
with sketch(model, "Top Plane") as sk:
    sketch_corner_rectangle(model, 0, mm(-0.75), mm(109.57), mm(0.75))

# 手动选择草图, 然后拉伸
model.ClearSelection2(True)
model.Extension.SelectByID2(sk, "SKETCH", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True,     # Sd: single direction
    False,    # Flip
    True,     # Dir: +Z
    0,        # T1: Blind
    0,        # T2: Blind
    mm(4),    # D1: 4mm
    0,        # D2
    False, False, False, False,
    0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    True,     # Merge
    False, True,
    0, 0.0, False
)
spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else "??"
print(f"[1-2/4] 辐条拉伸: 4mm +Z, 特征={spoke_name}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
model.ClearSelection2(True)
ext = model.Extension

# 选中辐条特征 (mark=4)
ext.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)

# 选外圆柱面作为阵列轴 (mark=1)
# 波带片外径110mm, Z=2mm 是中间高度
ext.SelectByID2("", "FACE", mm(109.9), 0, mm(2), True, 1, EV(), 0)

# 圆周阵列: 3个, 360°等间距
model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
    3,              # 数量
    2 * math.pi,    # 总角度 360°
    True,           # 等间距
    False,          # geometry pattern
    False,          # reverse direction
    True,           # pattern seed only
    True            # use auto select
)
print("[3/4] 圆周阵列: 3根辐条, 360°等间距")
gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4/4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
stat = os.stat(stl_path)
print(f"      导出STL: {stl_path} ({stat.st_size} bytes)")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

This suggests the issue is NOT with merging but with the extrusion itself. FeatureExtrusion3 can't create the extrusion from this sketch for some reason.

Possible reasons:
1. The sketch doesn't create a valid closed contour
2. The sketch geometry intersects problematically with existing geometry
3. There's a SolidWorks limitation preventing this particular extrusion

Let me think about what's different between this case and the previous successful extrusions (Parts 2 and 3):
- In Parts 2 and 3: NEW parts with simple geometry (rectangle → extrude, circle → extrude)
- In the zone plate: EXISTING complex geometry (multiple rings, multi-body), trying to add a thin rectangle

The key difference: the zone plate already has complex geometry. The rectangle at the center of the zone plate passes through ALL the rings. When extruding 4mm (the full thickness), the intersection between the spoke and the rings creates many edge intersections. This might be causing SolidWorks to fail.

Actually, I wonder if the problem is that the sketch rectangle is TOO THIN (1.5mm wide) relative to the 4mm extrusion height. For a thin extrusion, the aspect ratio might cause issues? But 1.5mm × 4mm is not extreme.

Let me think about the coordinate system. The zone plate is at Z=0 to Z=4. The sketch is on the Top Plane (Z=0). Extruding +Z 4mm goes from Z=0 to Z=4, which is the full thickness of the zone plate. This should work fine.

Actually, wait. Let me re-examine. What if the zone plate was modeled differently? What if the rings are separate bodies stacked at different Z heights? If each ring is at a different Z level, the total part might be thicker than 4mm.

The bounding box said Z=[0, 4], so the total thickness is 4mm. But the individual rings might be thinner or at different Z positions.

Hmm, let me look at this from a different angle. The zone plate has 5 bodies. Maybe some rings are separate bodies that don't touch each other at Z=0? In that case, the sketch on Top Plane (Z=0) might intersect with some bodies but not others. The extrude with merge might fail because it can't merge with bodies that don't overlap at the start plane.

Actually, FeatureExtrusion3 with merge=False should work regardless of existing bodies. It just creates a new extrusion. If THAT also fails (returns None), there must be something wrong with the sketch itself or the extrusion parameters.

Wait, could the issue be that the sketch contains a corner rectangle that's degenerate in some way? Corner rectangle from (0, -0.75mm) to (109.57mm, 0.75mm):
- Width in X: 109.57mm
- Width in Y: 1.5mm
- This is a very long, thin rectangle

Could SolidWorks be rejecting the extrusion because the rectangle is too thin? In theory, no - SolidWorks can handle thin extrusions. But maybe there's a setting or limitation.

Let me try a thicker rectangle, like 3mm or 5mm wide, to see if it's a width issue. If that works, I can narrow it down.

Also, let me try placing the rectangle at a different position, like offset from the center, to see if there's an intersection issue at the origin.

Let me update the script to try different approaches.

print(f"已备份: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1+2: 上视基准面 → 中心矩形画辐条 → 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z 合并
# ============================================================

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条 v2（不合并+手动合并策略）"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_part import (
    sketch_corner_rectangle, start_sketch, end_sketch
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

# ============================================================
session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# Step 0: 打开原文件并另存为
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
print(f"已打开: {get_com_member(model, 'GetTitle')}")
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已备份: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1+2: 上视基准面 → 画矩形辐条 → 拉伸
# ============================================================
start_sketch(model, "Top Plane")
sketch_corner_rectangle(model, 0, mm(-0.75), mm(109.57), mm(0.75))
end_sketch(model)
print("[1] 草图: 辐条矩形 1.5x109.57mm")

# 用坐标选中草图 (origin在草图上)
model.ClearSelection2(True)
sel_ok = model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "SKETCH", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
print(f"[2] 选中草图: {sel_ok}")

# 拉伸: 先不合并 (merge=False, UseAutoSelect=True)
spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True,     # Sd
    False,    # Flip
    True,     # Dir: +Z
    0,        # T1: Blind
    0,        # T2
    mm(4),    # D1: 4mm
    0,        # D2
    False, False, False, False,
    0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    False,    # Merge: NO
    False,    # UseFeatScope
    True,     # UseAutoSelect
    0, 0.0, False
)
spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
print(f"[2] 拉伸结果: {spoke_name or 'None (失败!)'}")

if not spoke_feat:
    # 备选: 尝试双向拉伸
    print("  尝试双向...")
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "SKETCH", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
    spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
        False, False, True, 0, 0, mm(4), mm(0.001),
        False, False, False, False, 0.0, 0.0,
        False, False, False, False,
        False, False, True,
        0, 0.0, False
    )
    spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
    print(f"  双向拉伸: {spoke_name or 'None'}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
if spoke_feat:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    # Select feature by name
    model.Extension.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)
    # Select outer cylindrical face as axis
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "FACE", mm(109.9), 0, mm(2), True, 1, EV(), 0)
    model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
        3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
    )
    print("[3] 圆周阵列: 3根辐条, 360°等间距")
    gc.collect()
else:
    print("[3] 跳过阵列 (辐条未创建)")

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 合并所有实体
# ============================================================
bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
n = len(bodies) if bodies else 0
print(f"    合并前实体数: {n}")

if n > 1:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    for i, body in enumerate(bodies):
        model.Extension.SelectByID2(body.Name, "SOLIDBODY", 0, 0, 0, i > 0, 0, EV(), 0)
    nothing = VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_DISPATCH, None)
    try:
        model.FeatureManager.InsertCombineFeature(0, nothing)
        print("[4] 实体已合并")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[4] 合并失败: {e}")

# ============================================================
# Step 5: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[5] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
print(f"    导出STL: {stl_path} ({os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes)")

# Final check
bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
print(f"    最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc}特征")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条 v4（手工画线绕过CreateCornerRectangle bug）"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# ============================================================
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已打开并备份")

# ============================================================
# Step 1: 手工创建草图 — 4条直线画矩形辐条
# ============================================================
model.ClearSelection2(True)
model.Extension.SelectByID2("Top Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
model.SketchManager.InsertSketch(True)
sm = model.SketchManager

# 矩形4边: (0,-0.75)→(109.57,-0.75)→(109.57,0.75)→(0,0.75)→(0,-0.75)
x0, x1 = 0, mm(109.57)
y0, y1 = mm(-0.75), mm(0.75)

sm.CreateLine(x0, y0, 0, x1, y0, 0)  # bottom edge
sm.CreateLine(x1, y0, 0, x1, y1, 0)  # right edge
sm.CreateLine(x1, y1, 0, x0, y1, 0)  # top edge
sm.CreateLine(x0, y1, 0, x0, y0, 0)  # left edge (closes contour)

# 在矩形外加一个微小圆保活草图 (SW bug workaround)
sm.CreateCircleByRadius(mm(0.5), mm(2), 0, mm(0.1))

model.SketchManager.InsertSketch(True)  # exit sketch
print("[1] 草图: 4线矩形 + 保活圆")

# ============================================================
# Step 2: 选中最新草图 → 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z 合并
# ============================================================
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
for i in range(fc):
    feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
    if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'ProfileFeature':
        feat.Select2(True, 0)
        print(f"[2] 选中草图: {feat.Name}")
        break

spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True, False, True, 0, 0, mm(4), 0,
    False, False, False, False, 0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    True,     # Merge
    False, True,
    0, 0.0, False
)
print(f"[2] 拉伸+合并: {'OK: '+spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else 'FAIL'}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
if spoke_feat:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    # Select the spoke feature by finding the most recent Extrusion feature
    fc2 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
    for i in range(fc2):
        feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
        if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
            feat.Select2(True, 4)
            print(f"[3] 选中特征: {feat.Name}")
            break

    # Select cylindrical face as axis
    # Try points on the outer cylinder surface
    axis_sel = False
    for r in [mm(109.9), mm(109.5), mm(109)]:
        for z in [mm(2), mm(1), mm(3)]:
            if model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "FACE", r, 0, z, True, 1, EV(), 0):
                axis_sel = True
                break
        if axis_sel:
            break

    if axis_sel:
        pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
            3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
        )
        print(f"[3] 阵列: {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL'}")
    else:
        print("[3] 阵列轴选择失败，尝试创建Z轴...")
        # Create reference axis: intersection of Front Plane and Right Plane = Z axis
        model.ClearSelection2(True)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2("Front Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2("Right Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, True, 0, EV(), 0)
        axis_feat = model.FeatureManager.InsertAxis2(True)
        if axis_feat:
            # Now use the created axis
            model.ClearSelection2(True)
            # Find and select spoke feature again
            fc3 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
                    feat.Select2(True, 4)
                    break
            # Find and select the axis
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'RefAxis':
                    feat.Select2(True, 1)
                    print(f"[3] 选中轴: {feat.Name}")
                    break
            pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
                3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
            )
            print(f"[3] 阵列(轴): {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL'}")

gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
print(f"    导出STL: {os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes")

bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
print(f"    最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc}特征")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条 v3（用中心矩形绕过CreateCornerRectangle bug）"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_part import sketch_rectangle, start_sketch, end_sketch
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

# ============================================================
session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
print(f"已打开: {get_com_member(model, 'GetTitle')}")
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已备份: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1+2: 上视基准面 → 中心矩形画辐条 → 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z 合并
# ============================================================
# 中心矩形: cx=109.57/2=54.785mm, cy=0, w=109.57mm, h=1.5mm
# → 产生矩形 (0,-0.75) ~ (109.57, 0.75)
start_sketch(model, "Top Plane")
sketch_rectangle(model, mm(54.785), 0, mm(109.57), mm(1.5))
end_sketch(model)
print("[1] 草图: 中心矩形 1.5x109.57mm")

# 通过枚举最新特征找到刚创建的草图，用 Select2 选中
model.ClearSelection2(True)
sketch_found = False
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
for i in range(fc):
    feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
    if feat:
        ftype = get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName')
        if ftype == 'ProfileFeature':  # this is a sketch
            feat.Select2(True, 0)
            sketch_found = True
            print(f"[2] 选中草图: {feat.Name}")
            break

if not sketch_found:
    raise RuntimeError("找不到新草图")

spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True,     # Sd
    False,    # Flip
    True,     # Dir: +Z
    0, 0,     # T1, T2
    mm(4), 0, # D1, D2
    False, False, False, False,
    0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    True,     # Merge!
    False, True,
    0, 0.0, False
)
spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
print(f"[2] 拉伸+合并: {spoke_name or '失败!'}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
if spoke_feat:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    model.Extension.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)
    # 选外圆柱面作阵列轴
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "FACE", mm(109.9), 0, mm(2), True, 1, EV(), 0)
    model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
        3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
    )
    print("[3] 圆周阵列: 3根辐条 360°等间距")
else:
    print("[3] 跳过 (辐条拉伸失败)")
gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
print(f"    导出STL: {stl_path} ({os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes)")

# 验证
bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
print(f"    最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc}特征")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# ============================================================
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已打开并备份")

# ============================================================
# Step 1: 手工创建草图 — 4条直线画矩形辐条
# ============================================================
model.ClearSelection2(True)
model.Extension.SelectByID2("Top Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
model.SketchManager.InsertSketch(True)
sm = model.SketchManager

# 矩形4边: (0,-0.75)→(109.57,-0.75)→(109.57,0.75)→(0,0.75)→(0,-0.75)
x0, x1 = 0, mm(109.57)
y0, y1 = mm(-0.75), mm(0.75)

sm.CreateLine(x0, y0, 0, x1, y0, 0)  # bottom edge
sm.CreateLine(x1, y0, 0, x1, y1, 0)  # right edge
sm.CreateLine(x1, y1, 0, x0, y1, 0)  # top edge
sm.CreateLine(x0, y1, 0, x0, y0, 0)  # left edge (closes contour)

# 在矩形外加一个微小圆保活草图 (SW bug workaround)
sm.CreateCircleByRadius(mm(0.5), mm(2), 0, mm(0.1))

model.SketchManager.InsertSketch(True)  # exit sketch
print("[1] 草图: 4线矩形 + 保活圆")

# ============================================================
# Step 2: 选中最新草图 → 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z 合并
# ============================================================
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
for i in range(fc):
    feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
    if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'ProfileFeature':
        feat.Select2(True, 0)
        print(f"[2] 选中草图: {feat.Name}")
        break

spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True, False, True, 0, 0, mm(4), 0,
    False, False, False, False, 0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    True,     # Merge
    False, True,
    0, 0.0, False
)
print(f"[2] 拉伸+合并: {'OK: '+spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else 'FAIL'}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
if spoke_feat:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    # Select the spoke feature by finding the most recent Extrusion feature
    fc2 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
    for i in range(fc2):
        feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
        if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
            feat.Select2(True, 4)
            print(f"[3] 选中特征: {feat.Name}")
            break

    # Select cylindrical face as axis
    # Try points on the outer cylinder surface
    axis_sel = False
    for r in [mm(109.9), mm(109.5), mm(109)]:
        for z in [mm(2), mm(1), mm(3)]:
            if model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "FACE", r, 0, z, True, 1, EV(), 0):
                axis_sel = True
                break
        if axis_sel:
            break

    if axis_sel:
        pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
            3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
        )
        print(f"[3] 阵列: {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL'}")
    else:
        print("[3] 阵列轴选择失败，尝试创建Z轴...")
        # Create reference axis: intersection of Front Plane and Right Plane = Z axis
        model.ClearSelection2(True)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2("Front Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2("Right Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, True, 0, EV(), 0)
        axis_feat = model.FeatureManager.InsertAxis2(True)
        if axis_feat:
            # Now use the created axis
            model.ClearSelection2(True)
            # Find and select spoke feature again
            fc3 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
                    feat.Select2(True, 4)
                    break
            # Find and select the axis
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'RefAxis':
                    feat.Select2(True, 1)
                    print(f"[3] 选中轴: {feat.Name}")
                    break
            pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
                3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
            )
            print(f"[3] 阵列(轴): {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL'}")

gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
print(f"    导出STL: {os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes")

bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
print(f"    最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc}特征")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

x0, x1 = 0, mm(109.57)
y0, y1 = mm(-0.75), mm(0.75)

sm.CreateLine(x0, y0, 0, x1, y0, 0)  # bottom

For the axis: let me try creating a reference axis instead of using a cylindrical face. The zone plate's outer cylindrical face might not be selectable for some reason.

Let me update the circular pattern to create a Z-axis first, then use it.

Also, I notice the array step had a bug: it was trying to select the axis from the face, but the face selection might have failed. Then it would try the InsertAxis2 approach. Let me make the InsertAxis2 approach the primary method.

Actually wait, let me re-examine. In the manual test, the circular pattern returned None even though:
1. The spoke feature was selected (ext.Select2 with mark=4)
2. The cylindrical face was selected (SelectByID2 with mark=1)

Maybe the issue is that FeatureCircularPattern4 needs 3 objects selected (feature + axis), but SelectByID2 with append=True might not be working correctly.

Let me try:
1. Clear selection
2. Use model.Extension.SelectByID2 to select feature
3. Use model.Extension.SelectByID2 to select axis face (append=True)
4. Call FeatureCircularPattern4

Let me restructure the pattern section to be more robust.

Actually, looking at the sw_part.circular_pattern function:
```python
def circular_pattern(model, feature_name, axis_name, angle_rad, count, equal_spacing=True):
    _select_by_id(model.Extension, feature_name, "BODYFEATURE", mark=4)
    _select_by_id(model.Extension, axis_name, "AXIS", append=True, mark=1)
    return model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
        count, angle_rad, False, "None", False, equal_spacing, False
    )
```

This uses _select_by_id which calls SelectByID2 with proper Callout parameter. And it uses "AXIS" type for the axis.

In my script, I'm using "FACE" for the axis (cylindrical face). SolidWorks allows cylindrical faces as axis references for circular patterns. But SelectByID2 with "FACE" type might require coordinates that are ON that face.

Let me try using the approach from sw_part.circular_pattern but adapted: select the feature by feature Select2, and select the axis by creating a reference axis first.

if spoke_feat:
    # 3a: 创建Z轴 (Front Plane ∩ Right Plane = Z axis)
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("Front Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("Right Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, True, 0, EV(), 0)
    axis_feat = model.FeatureManager.InsertAxis2(True)
    axis_ok = axis_feat is not None
    print(f"[3a] 创建Z轴: {'OK' if axis_ok else 'FAIL'}")

    if axis_ok:
        # 3b: 选辐条特征 + Z轴, 阵列
        model.ClearSelection2(True)
        # Find the spoke feature (most recent Extrusion)
        fc3 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
        for i in range(fc3):
            feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
            if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
                feat.Select2(True, 4)
                print(f"[3b] 选辐条: {feat.Name}")
                break

        # Find and select the axis
        for i in range(fc3):
            feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
            if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'RefAxis':
                feat.Select2(True, 1)
                print(f"[3b] 选轴: {feat.Name}")
                break

        pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
            3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
        )
        print(f"[3c] 圆周阵列: {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL (尝试备选)...'}")

        if not pat:
            # Fallback: try SelectByID2 approach
            model.ClearSelection2(True)
            # Find spoke feature by enumerating again
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':

            # Select axis
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'RefAxis':
                    model.Extension.SelectByID2(feat.Name, "AXIS", 0, 0, 0, True, 1, EV(), 0)
                    break
            pat2 = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
                3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
            )
            print(f"    备选: {'OK' if pat2 else 'FAIL'}")

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条 v4（手工画线绕过CreateCornerRectangle bug）"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# ============================================================
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已打开并备份")

# ============================================================
# Step 1: 手工创建草图 — 4条直线画矩形辐条
# ============================================================
model.ClearSelection2(True)
model.Extension.SelectByID2("Top Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
model.SketchManager.InsertSketch(True)
sm = model.SketchManager

# 矩形4边: (0,-0.75)→(109.57,-0.75)→(109.57,0.75)→(0,0.75)→(0,-0.75)
x0, x1 = 0, mm(109.57)
y0, y1 = mm(-0.75), mm(0.75)

sm.CreateLine(x0, y0, 0, x1, y0, 0)  # bottom
sm.CreateLine(x1, y0, 0, x1, y1, 0)  # right
sm.CreateLine(x1, y1, 0, x0, y1, 0)  # top
sm.CreateLine(x0, y1, 0, x0, y0, 0)  # left (close)

# 微型圆保活草图 (Φ0.02mm, 藏于辐条内, SW bug workaround)
# CreateCornerRectangle/CreateCenterRectangle 在此文件上返回 None
sm.CreateCircleByRadius(mm(0.1), 0, 0, mm(0.01))

model.SketchManager.InsertSketch(True)  # exit sketch
print("[1] 草图: 4线矩形 + 保活圆")

# ============================================================
# Step 2: 选中最新草图 → 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z 合并
# ============================================================
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
for i in range(fc):
    feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
    if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'ProfileFeature':
        feat.Select2(True, 0)
        print(f"[2] 选中草图: {feat.Name}")
        break

spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True, False, True, 0, 0, mm(4), 0,
    False, False, False, False, 0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    True,     # Merge
    False, True,
    0, 0.0, False
)
print(f"[2] 拉伸+合并: {'OK: '+spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else 'FAIL'}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
if spoke_feat:
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    # Select the spoke feature by finding the most recent Extrusion feature
    fc2 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
    for i in range(fc2):
        feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
        if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
            feat.Select2(True, 4)
            print(f"[3] 选中特征: {feat.Name}")
            break

    # Select cylindrical face as axis
    # Try points on the outer cylinder surface
    axis_sel = False
    for r in [mm(109.9), mm(109.5), mm(109)]:
        for z in [mm(2), mm(1), mm(3)]:
            if model.Extension.SelectByID2("", "FACE", r, 0, z, True, 1, EV(), 0):
                axis_sel = True
                break
        if axis_sel:
            break

    if axis_sel:
        pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
            3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
        )
        print(f"[3] 阵列: {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL'}")
    else:
        print("[3] 阵列轴选择失败，尝试创建Z轴...")
        # Create reference axis: intersection of Front Plane and Right Plane = Z axis
        model.ClearSelection2(True)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2("Front Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2("Right Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, True, 0, EV(), 0)
        axis_feat = model.FeatureManager.InsertAxis2(True)
        if axis_feat:
            # Now use the created axis
            model.ClearSelection2(True)
            # Find and select spoke feature again
            fc3 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
                    feat.Select2(True, 4)
                    break
            # Find and select the axis
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'RefAxis':
                    feat.Select2(True, 1)
                    print(f"[3] 选中轴: {feat.Name}")
                    break
            pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
                3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
            )
            print(f"[3] 阵列(轴): {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL'}")

gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
print(f"    导出STL: {os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes")

bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
print(f"    最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc}特征")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

        entity_name, entity_type, 0, 0, 0, append, mark, _empty_callout(), 0
    )
```

My script uses `EV()` which is `create_empty_dispatch_variant()` which also returns `VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_DISPATCH, None)`.

These should be the same. But maybe there's a subtle difference in how the VARIANT is constructed.

    return VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_DISPATCH, None)
```

And sw_connect.create_empty_dispatch_variant:
```python
def create_empty_dispatch_variant():
    return VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_DISPATCH, None)
```

These are identical. So the Callout parameter should be the same.

- x1=mm(109.57)=0.10957, y0=-0.00075

These are in meters. This should create a line from (0, -0.75mm) to (109.57mm, -0.75mm).

But if the sketch is a 3D sketch (because the plane wasn't selected), then the line might behave differently. In a 3D sketch, the z coordinate matters more.

```python

```

Wait, but the earlier test showed that `start_sketch` works (in the multi-test). But in the Part 2/3 scripts it also worked. The issue in my script is that I'm NOT using start_sketch - I'm manually calling SelectByID2.

Let me change to use start_sketch. It's more reliable and already proven to work in the Part 2/3 scripts.

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条 v4（手工画线绕过CreateCornerRectangle bug）"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_session import SolidWorksSession

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

session = SolidWorksSession(visible=False)
session.sw.Visible = False
sw = session.sw

# ============================================================
model = session.open(ORIGINAL)
session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"已打开并备份")

# ============================================================
# Step 1: 手工创建草图 — 4条直线画矩形辐条
# ============================================================
model.ClearSelection2(True)
model.Extension.SelectByID2("Top Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
model.SketchManager.InsertSketch(True)
sm = model.SketchManager

# 矩形4边: (0,-0.75)→(109.57,-0.75)→(109.57,0.75)→(0,0.75)→(0,-0.75)
x0, x1 = 0, mm(109.57)
y0, y1 = mm(-0.75), mm(0.75)

sm.CreateLine(x0, y0, 0, x1, y0, 0)  # bottom
sm.CreateLine(x1, y0, 0, x1, y1, 0)  # right
sm.CreateLine(x1, y1, 0, x0, y1, 0)  # top
sm.CreateLine(x0, y1, 0, x0, y0, 0)  # left (close)

# 微型圆保活草图 (Φ0.02mm, 藏于辐条内, SW bug workaround)
# CreateCornerRectangle/CreateCenterRectangle 在此文件上返回 None
sm.CreateCircleByRadius(mm(0.1), 0, 0, mm(0.01))

model.SketchManager.InsertSketch(True)  # exit sketch
print("[1] 草图: 4线矩形 + 保活圆")

# ============================================================
# Step 2: 选中最新草图 → 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z 合并
# ============================================================
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
for i in range(fc):
    feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
    if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'ProfileFeature':
        feat.Select2(True, 0)
        print(f"[2] 选中草图: {feat.Name}")
        break

spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True, False, True, 0, 0, mm(4), 0,
    False, False, False, False, 0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    True,     # Merge
    False, True,
    0, 0.0, False
)
print(f"[2] 拉伸+合并: {'OK: '+spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else 'FAIL'}")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 创建 Z 参考轴 + 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
if spoke_feat:
    # 3a: 创建Z轴 (Front Plane ∩ Right Plane = Z axis)
    model.ClearSelection2(True)
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("Front Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
    model.Extension.SelectByID2("Right Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, True, 0, EV(), 0)
    axis_feat = model.FeatureManager.InsertAxis2(True)
    axis_ok = axis_feat is not None
    print(f"[3a] 创建Z轴: {'OK' if axis_ok else 'FAIL'}")

    if axis_ok:
        # 3b: 选辐条特征 + Z轴, 阵列
        model.ClearSelection2(True)
        # Find the spoke feature (most recent Extrusion)
        fc3 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
        for i in range(fc3):
            feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
            if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
                feat.Select2(True, 4)
                print(f"[3b] 选辐条: {feat.Name}")
                break

        # Find and select the axis
        for i in range(fc3):
            feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
            if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'RefAxis':
                feat.Select2(True, 1)
                print(f"[3b] 选轴: {feat.Name}")
                break

        pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
            3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
        )
        print(f"[3c] 圆周阵列: {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL (尝试备选)...'}")

        if not pat:
            # Fallback: try SelectByID2 approach
            model.ClearSelection2(True)
            # Find spoke feature by enumerating again
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'Extrusion':
                    model.Extension.SelectByID2(feat.Name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)
                    break
            # Select axis
            for i in range(fc3):
                feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
                if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'RefAxis':
                    model.Extension.SelectByID2(feat.Name, "AXIS", 0, 0, 0, True, 1, EV(), 0)
                    break
            pat2 = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
                3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
            )
            print(f"    备选: {'OK' if pat2 else 'FAIL'}")

gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

session.save(model, BACKUP)
print(f"[4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
session.export(model, stl_path)
print(f"    导出STL: {os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes")

bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
print(f"    最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc}特征")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")

import sys, os, math
sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill\scripts')
import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import connect_solidworks, mm, get_com_member, create_empty_dispatch_variant

sw, _ = connect_solidworks(visible=False)
path = r'D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d\菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt'
errors = VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_BYREF | pythoncom.VT_I4, 0)
warnings = VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_BYREF | pythoncom.VT_I4, 0)
model = sw.OpenDoc6(path, 1, 0, '', errors, warnings)
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

if model:
    fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
    print(f'特征数: {fc}')
    
    # Find the spoke feature (most recent Extrusion)
    spoke_name = None
    for i in range(fc):
        feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
        if feat:
            ftype = get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName')
            if ftype == 'Extrusion':
                spoke_name = feat.Name
                print(f'辐条特征: {spoke_name}')
                break
    
    if spoke_name:
        # Create Z axis (Front Plane + Right Plane intersection)
        model.ClearSelection2(True)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2('Front Plane', 'PLANE', 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2('Right Plane', 'PLANE', 0, 0, 0, True, 0, EV(), 0)
        axis_feat = model.FeatureManager.InsertAxis2(True)
        print(f'创建Z轴: {axis_feat is not None}')
        
        # Select spoke feature + axis for pattern
        model.ClearSelection2(True)
        model.Extension.SelectByID2(spoke_name, 'BODYFEATURE', 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)
        
        # Find axis name
        axis_name = None
        for i in range(get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')):
            feat = model.FeatureByPositionReverse(i)
            if feat and get_com_member(feat, 'GetTypeName') == 'RefAxis':
                axis_name = feat.Name
                break
        
        if axis_name:
            model.Extension.SelectByID2(axis_name, 'AXIS', 0, 0, 0, True, 1, EV(), 0)
            print(f'选轴: {axis_name}')
            
            pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
                3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
            )
            print(f'圆周阵列: {pat is not None}')
            
            get_com_member(model, 'ForceRebuild3', False)
            get_com_member(model, 'ViewZoomtofit2')
            model.Save3(1, errors, warnings)
            print('已保存!')
            
            # Export STL
            from sw_export import export_to_stl
            stl_path = r'D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d\菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl'
            export_to_stl(model, stl_path)
            print(f'STL导出: {stl_path} ({os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes)')
            
            # Final stats
            bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
            fc2 = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
            print(f'最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc2}特征')
    
    sw.CloseDoc('菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt')

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""菲涅尔波带片 — 添加3根辐条 终版（CreateSketchSlot + 阵列）"""
import sys, os, gc, math

SKILL = r"C:\Users\Nijika\.claude\skills\solidworks-automation-skill"
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(SKILL, "scripts"))

import pythoncom
from win32com.client import VARIANT
from sw_connect import (
    connect_solidworks, mm, create_empty_dispatch_variant, get_com_member
)
from sw_export import export_to_stl
from sw_part import start_sketch, end_sketch

OUTPUT = r"D:\钉钉\学习工作文件\物理实验创新竞赛\3d"
ORIGINAL = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_F120_N10.SLDPRT")
BACKUP = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.sldprt")
EV = create_empty_dispatch_variant

# ============================================================
# 连接 + 打开原始文件 + 另存为备份
# ============================================================
sw, _ = connect_solidworks(visible=False)
sw.Visible = False
errors = VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_BYREF | pythoncom.VT_I4, 0)
warnings = VARIANT(pythoncom.VT_BYREF | pythoncom.VT_I4, 0)
model = sw.OpenDoc6(ORIGINAL, 1, 0, "", errors, warnings)
if not model:
    raise RuntimeError(f"无法打开: {ORIGINAL}")

model.Extension.SaveAs(BACKUP, 0, 1, EV(), errors, warnings)
print(f"已备份: {BACKUP}")

# ============================================================
# Step 1: 上视基准面 → 草图槽口 → 拉伸凸台 4mm +Z 合并
# ============================================================
start_sketch(model, "Top Plane")
sm = model.SketchManager
# 槽口: 中心沿X轴, 起点(0,0) → 终点(109.57,0), 宽1.5mm, 端半径0.75mm
sm.CreateSketchSlot(
    0, mm(1.5), mm(0.75),
    0, 0, 0,
    mm(109.57), 0, 0,
    0, 0, 0, 1, False
)
# 直接在活动草图中拉伸
spoke_feat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureExtrusion3(
    True, False, True, 0, 0, mm(4), 0,
    False, False, False, False, 0.0, 0.0,
    False, False, False, False,
    True,  # Merge
    False, True,
    0, 0.0, False
)
end_sketch(model)
spoke_name = spoke_feat.Name if spoke_feat else None
print(f"[1-2] 辐条槽口拉伸: {'OK: ' + spoke_name if spoke_feat else 'FAIL'}")

if not spoke_feat:
    raise RuntimeError("辐条拉伸失败")

# ============================================================
# Step 3: 创建 Z 参考轴 + 圆周阵列 ×3
# ============================================================
model.ClearSelection2(True)
model.Extension.SelectByID2("Front Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, False, 0, EV(), 0)
model.Extension.SelectByID2("Right Plane", "PLANE", 0, 0, 0, True, 0, EV(), 0)
axis_feat = model.InsertAxis2(True)  # NOTE: InsertAxis2 is on ModelDoc2, not FeatureManager!
print(f"[3a] 创建Z轴: {'OK' if axis_feat else 'FAIL'}")

if not axis_feat:
    raise RuntimeError("Z轴创建失败")

# Select spoke + axis for pattern
model.ClearSelection2(True)
model.Extension.SelectByID2(spoke_name, "BODYFEATURE", 0, 0, 0, False, 4, EV(), 0)
model.Extension.SelectByID2(axis_feat.Name, "AXIS", 0, 0, 0, True, 1, EV(), 0)

pat = model.FeatureManager.FeatureCircularPattern4(
    3, 2 * math.pi, True, False, False, True, True
)
print(f"[3b] 圆周阵列: {'OK' if pat else 'FAIL'}")
gc.collect()

# ============================================================
# Step 4: 保存 + 导出 STL
# ============================================================
get_com_member(model, "ForceRebuild3", False)
get_com_member(model, "ViewZoomtofit2")

model.Extension.SaveAs(BACKUP, 0, 1, EV(), errors, warnings)
print(f"[4] 已保存: {BACKUP}")

stl_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT, "菲涅尔波带片_N10_带辐条.stl")
export_to_stl(model, stl_path)
print(f"    导出STL: {stl_path} ({os.stat(stl_path).st_size} bytes)")

bodies = model.GetBodies2(0, False)
fc = get_com_member(model, 'GetFeatureCount')
print(f"    最终: {len(bodies) if bodies else 0}实体, {fc}特征")

title = get_com_member(model, "GetTitle")
sw.CloseDoc(title)
gc.collect()
print("\n===== 完成 =====")
